message:
bd-3bxhj.2.5: Extract UI composition semantics from parsed TSX

Component tree extraction bridging tsx_parser output to migration_ir:
- ComponentTree with deterministic SHA-256 node IDs and parent-child links
- Props contract resolution: type annotations, defaults, callbacks, sources
- Conditional pattern detection: guards, ternaries, list maps, suspense
- State binding extraction: useState/useReducer/useRef/useContext hooks
- Slot detection: children, render props, named slots
- Type map resolution from TypeDecl to structured ResolvedType
- to_view_tree() converter producing migration_ir::ViewTree
- Semantic warnings for unresolved types and missing state setters
- 24 unit tests covering all extraction paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
